memory.summary: My midterm is tomorrow morning, and while I'm 60% through my review, the group is leaving for Echo soon.
I successfully declined Mina's invitation to prioritize my midterm review, which is scheduled for tomorrow morning.
My midterm review is now at 78% progress after two hours, and I've confirmed the opportunity to go out with friends has passed.
I am fully rested with high energy, yet my midterm is tomorrow morning and I am only 78% through my review.
I confirmed declining Mina's invitation at 06:30, solidifying my choice to focus entirely on the midterm review scheduled for tomorrow morning.
I have finished the midterm review just as the exam begins, leaving me fully prepared with high energy and no stress.
I joined the social club after finishing my review, and despite having high energy, I am now balancing post-exam socialization with my completed academic obligations.
My study session shows no progress, meaning the review is not actually done despite my earlier belief. I am still unprepared for tomorrow's midterm with only 2 hours left.
